About Me

Crafting worlds in
3D & beyond.

Hi, I'm Yumeth — a 17-year-old creative from Sri Lanka, currently pursuing my Foundation in Computing at ACBT. I specialize in bringing ideas to life through high-quality 3D modelling, rendering, and graphic design. I also have a growing passion for software design and computing, blending technical skill with a sharp creative eye.
